CustomField.description: When the Billing Override Approved by Manager field on a Combined Funnel is updated to No, the automation will find the respective In Progress Onboarding Attempt and update it with today’s date.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: When the Billing Override Approved by Manager field on a Combined Funnel is updated to No, the automation will find the respective In Progress Onboarding Attempt and update it with today’s date.
CustomField.label: Date of Billing Override Denial
